crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Is the artifact limited to evaluation assurance education or claim hygiene
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Scope paragraph blocked use paragraph user role list

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Are clinician and builder roles explained before model output use
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Literacy module role checklist review worksheet

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Are failure modes harms and escalation paths listed before scores
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Failure atlas rows escalation table release gate

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Are source label representativeness leakage and missingness checks visible
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Data quality card label audit row dataset boundary note

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Is every public claim tied to source support and audit state
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: SourceCheckup output manual source support audit note

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Can an external reviewer see what is and is not claimed
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: README link issue body release note boundary section

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Is clinician review treated as a gate rather than decoration
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Clinician review protocol reviewer role table

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Are failure cases uncertainty and abstention language present
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Synthetic risk pack warning sign checklist

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Are secrets private data and operational systems excluded
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: No secrets statement no private operational data statement

crosswalk_rows.public_artifact_question: Is post release public review possible without patient data
crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Public issue template contributor guide triage board

crosswalk_rows.evidence_to_prepare: Public issue label maintainer handoff correction log
